speaker: MATT
raw_text: No. Right now everyone rolls initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Spike Growth, okay, that is different.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, which is-- the ground in a 20-foot radius centered on a point within range twists and sprouts hard spikes and thorns. It's difficult terrain for the duration, but anybody that can see me casting it doesn't take damage to it, it's only the people that don't see me casting it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. Any creature that can't see the area at the time the spell is cast must make a wisdom check.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, but can they see the area?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh. Well, that's not quite the same thing, then, what I saw. (yells) Forget it, my spell is stupid!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: It's fine, just not in a hallway with stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's fine, just stick to arrows, really.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: She can do so much more than just arrows!

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: As I see this, can I release my Control Flame and let the Fire Breath just happen, and not control it anymore?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Looking into your spell now. Oh, Control Flames is a cantrip. You are able to control just enough fire to burn away the things. It wouldn't actually do any damage if released. Control Fire kind of like captures an element of it.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: Okay. So that's what I was using, the element of what I did.

preceding_turns.speaker: ORION
preceding_turns.text: So I used it so I could have the fire.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You set it as a catalyst to it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Doesn't it mess up the ground if we try to walk through it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: But they're spiders. They're probably not that wise.
